title: Mediterranean Lamb Skewers
description: Grilled lamb skewers seasoned with herbs and spices, perfect for a summer evening. This dish is inspired by the flavors of the Mediterranean.
instructions: 2. In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, herb mix, garlic, and lemon juice.
3. Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
4. Thread the lamb cubes onto the skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the lamb is cooked to your desired level of doneness.
7. Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
